form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming 12th of 14 at Ascot Grad Hcp 60+ on March 14 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind King Hit carrying 59kg at $101. Second run from a spell 4th of 11 at Belmont Park Cl3 on April 2 over 1400m, 2 len behind Peter Gunn with 57kg at $8. Fitter again and rates highly.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 11 at Ascot Cl3 on April 3 over 1600m, 0.7 len behind Dark Looks carrying 57.5kg at $5.50. The race before that won by 2 len at Albany Cl2 March 19 over 1500m on a soft track defeating Puissance Playboy with 59kg at $4.40. Should give a big sight.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation third of 10 at Collie Collie Cup 64+ October 25 over 1990m, 14 len behind Divine Mercy with 55kg at $31. Previously first up; ran last of 12 at Ascot 0Mwly May 7 over 1600m, 8 len behind Black For Cash with 55kg at $51. Form at the end of his last preparation suggests he is likely to struggle.

form.formComment: Back after a long spell. Finished off last campaign ran last of 12 at Belmont Park Cl3 on September 24 over 1400m, 16 len behind Cavallo Red carrying 54kg at $151. When resuming last campaign second last of 12 at Pinjarra Cl3 on May 14 over 1200m, 12 len behind Chop Suey carrying 54.5kg at $101. Trialled on March 30 at Belmont Park over 1200m and finished sixth. Will take benefit from this outing.
